reviews.comment:
Enojado porque fui con mi hija de dos años y no tienen cambiador en el baño.. Consumí en el lugar y me tuve q ir a otra estación de servicio a cambiarla. Nº me parece lógico!

(Translated by Google)
I'm angry because I went with my two-year-old daughter and they don't have a changing table in the bathroom. I bought something there and had to go to another gas station to change her. That doesn't make sense!
